name: InsuranceExternalDataFeeds
desc: External data feeds schema for third-party data integration. Includes credit bureau reports, motor vehicle records, market data, weather, demographics, regulatory information, and compliance screening data. Provides 27 feed tables organized across 6 business domains.

tables.name: EXT_CREDIT_BUREAU_TRW
tables.comment: TRW credit bureau data — credit score, payment history, accounts

tables.name: EXT_CREDIT_BUREAU_EQUIFAX
tables.comment: Equifax credit bureau data

tables.name: EXT_CREDIT_BUREAU_EXPERIAN
tables.comment: Experian credit bureau data

tables.name: EXT_IDENTITY_VERIFICATION
tables.comment: Third-party identity verification and KYC data

tables.name: EXT_MOTOR_VEHICLE_RECORD
tables.comment: Motor Vehicle Report from state DMV databases

tables.name: EXT_CLAIM_HISTORY_LEXIS
tables.comment: LexisNexis CLUE (Comprehensive Loss Underwriting Exchange) report

tables.name: EXT_REINSURANCE_MARKET_DATA
tables.comment: Reinsurance market pricing and capacity from brokers/market feeds

tables.name: EXT_ECONOMIC_INDICATORS
tables.comment: Macroeconomic data — unemployment, inflation, interest rates, GDP

tables.name: EXT_CURRENCY_RATES
tables.comment: Daily currency exchange rates for reinsurance settlements

tables.name: EXT_INTEREST_RATES
tables.comment: Interest rates (Treasury, LIBOR, Fed Funds) for cash flow modeling

tables.name: EXT_CREDIT_RATINGS_AGENCY
tables.comment: Credit ratings from S&P, Moody's, Fitch for reinsurer/counterparty monitoring

tables.name: EXT_WEATHER_HISTORICAL
tables.comment: Historical weather data by location — temperature, precipitation, wind

tables.name: EXT_WEATHER_FORECAST
tables.comment: Weather forecast data for loss prevention and claims prediction

tables.name: EXT_CATASTROPHE_EXPOSED_RISK
tables.comment: Real-time catastrophe exposure modeling from cat modeling vendors

tables.name: EXT_DEMOGRAPHIC_DATA
tables.comment: Census, household, and lifestyle demographic data

tables.name: EXT_PROPERTY_VALUATION
tables.comment: Property valuation and market data from Zillow, Core Logic, CIMIS

tables.name: EXT_REGULATORY_DATA
tables.comment: Regulatory filings, enforcement actions, compliance alerts

tables.name: EXT_COMPETITOR_PRICING
tables.comment: Competitor rates and quotes for market intelligence

tables.name: EXT_SANCTIONS_LISTS
tables.comment: OFAC, UN, EU sanctions lists for compliance screening

tables.name: EXT_PEP_LISTS
tables.comment: Politically Exposed Persons (PEP) lists from third-party vendors

tables.name: EXT_AML_ALERTS
tables.comment: Anti-Money Laundering alerts and monitoring flags

dict.Source: Third-party data providers and regulatory feeds

viewpoints.name: Credit & Identity
viewpoints.desc: Credit bureau reports, identity verification, underwriting data

viewpoints.name: Motor Vehicle & Claims History
viewpoints.desc: Driver records, violation history, prior claims

viewpoints.name: Market & Financial
viewpoints.desc: Reinsurance market data, economic indicators, rates, credit ratings

viewpoints.name: Weather & Catastrophe
viewpoints.desc: Weather history, forecasts, cat exposure modeling

viewpoints.name: Demographics & Valuation
viewpoints.desc: Census data, property valuations, lifestyle, competitor pricing

viewpoints.name: Regulatory & Compliance
viewpoints.desc: Regulatory data, sanctions screening, PEP lists, AML alerts
